title: anisomeles carpentarica
intro: Anisomeles carpentarica, also known as Carpenter's Herb, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. In terms of herbal preparations, Anisomeles carpentarica is often used in teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as being used in traditional Ayurvedic remedies like powders and capsules.
